task_completion.description: Navigate to the CAMEO Chemicals website.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open and displaying the CAMEO Chemicals website (cameochemicals.noaa.gov).

task_completion.description: Search for UN number 1092 and locate the chemical record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The web browser shows search results or the specific chemical datasheet for UN 1092, identifying it as Acrolein.

task_completion.description: Create the un1092_field_report.txt file in the ~/Documents directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window shows a file named 'un1092_field_report.txt' located in the Documents folder.

task_completion.description: Record the basic chemical identifiers and hazard classifications in the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains the correct values for Chemical Name (Acrolein), CAS Number (107-02-8), UN/NA Number (1092), DOT Hazard Class (6.1 and 3), and ERG Guide Number (131).

task_completion.description: Record the NFPA hazard ratings in the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains the correct NFPA ratings: Health (4), Fire (3), and Instability (3 or 2).

task_completion.description: Record the physical properties of the chemical in the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains the correct physical properties: Boiling Point (~52.2°C / 126°F), Flash Point (~-26.1°C / -15°F), Vapor Density (~1.94), Molecular Weight (~56.06), and Chemical Formula (CH2CHCHO or C3H4O).

integrity.description: The agent actually used the CAMEO Chemicals website to find the information.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the CAMEO Chemicals web interface, rather than the agent just writing the file from its pre-trained memory.

integrity.description: The agent created and saved the actual text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: A text editor (like gedit, nano, vim) or a terminal command (like echo, cat) is visible writing to or displaying the contents of ~/Documents/un1092_field_report.txt.

integrity.description: The agent followed the requested key-value format.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text file strictly follows the 'Key: Value' format with one item per line as specified in the prompt, without extra conversational text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Chemical: Acrolein (or Acrolein, Stabilized). CAS Number: 107-02-8. UN/NA Number: 1092. DOT Hazard Class: 6.1 (primary) and 3 (secondary). ERG Guide Number: 131. NFPA Ratings: Health 4, Fire 3, Instability 3 (accept 2). Physical Properties (approximate, based on CAMEO): Boiling Point 52.2°C (126°F), Flash Point -26.1°C (-15°F), Vapor Density 1.94, Molecular Weight 56.06, Chemical Formula CH2CHCHO (or C3H4O).
